# Copilot instructions

## Project overview
- This repository hosts a single-page static site served by GitHub Pages.
- The site is implemented primarily in `index.html` with embedded CSS and JavaScript.
- Brand styling relies on Space Grotesk and OSM colors: primary `#F27459`, accent `#63C5F6`.

## Repository layout
- `index.html` contains the HTML, styles, and scripts.
- `assets/` contains static images such as the logo SVG.

## Development & verification
- There are no automated build, lint, or test commands.
- Manually verify changes by opening `index.html` in a browser and checking layout, theming, and interactions.

## Change guidelines
- Keep changes minimal and scoped to the issue being addressed.
- Prefer vanilla HTML/CSS/JS; avoid adding new frameworks or build tools.
- Match existing formatting and accessibility patterns (semantic elements, aria labels, and contrast-aware colors).
